title: Max's Immersive Modpack
description: A modpack designed by yours truly, aiming to make Minecraft super immersive while keeping a vanilla and new feel.
body:
# Max's Immersive Modpack
**Immerse** yourself in the rich, blocky world of Minecraft with Max's Immersive Modpack! (MIM) A modpack designed to enhance your experience without straying too far from the vanilla feel. Carefully curated to preserve the charm of the base game, this modpack adds layers of immersion through subtle and huge tweaks and additions.

## What does it do?
MIM introduces features that bring more depth to exploration, survival, and building while maintaining the spirit of vanilla Minecraft. From improved world generation and ambient sounds to _many_ intuitive quality-of-life changes and new dimensions, the mods included in this pack seamlessly blend with the core game. Whether you're a solo explorer, a builder, or a casual survivalist, MIM enhances your gameplay without overwhelming you with complexity or diverging from what makes Minecraft special. (Perfect to play with friends too! Thanks to [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)!!!)

## Credits 
I wanna first off **thank ALL the mod creators that made this modpack possible.** Their hard work and talent are big inspirations of mine to create more modpacks and even start making my own mods! The list of mods, resource packs, and shaders can be found in the bottom. 

I also want to thank **SkullZGaming** for being an amazing modpack tester and friend for helping me push this project forward! Please check out his YouTube channel and please give him tons of support! [Link to his channel here!!](https://www.youtube.com/@SkullZGaming_)

### Mod List
